overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Uncapped Accelerator ETF - July (UXJL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in enhanced growth alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that charges 2%, on top of the expense ratio, in an attempt to provide a potential rate of return that outperforms a US large cap equity ETF. Using one-year FLEX options, the fund constructs a call spread combined with a deep-in-the-money long call UXJL was launched on Jul 18, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
